description: CompositionIndigo blue denim shorts made of 72% cotton, 26.5% polyester and 1.5% spandex, has fading on thighs and back, above knee length, has a zip and button closure, belt loops on waistband, two front pockets with one change pocket, two patch pockets on back with embroidery and distressed detailing, silver patch on back waistband and turn up cuffsFitRegularWash careMachine or hand wash seperately with mild detergentDo not bleach or wringDry in shadeMedium ironLook funky and fashionable in these shorts from jealous 21.  Perfect to wear on a fun day out with friends, pop it on with your favourite colourful tee and heeled sandals.Model statisticsThe product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8" and waist 26"
